title: ilex mexicana
intro: Ilex mexicana, also known as the Mexican holly or Texas holly, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex mexicana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Ilex mexicana can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", ilex mexicana benefits include its traditional use in Mexican medicine for the treatment of diarrhoea, attributed to its antiprotozoal properties.
